name: Sweepstakes Advantage
description: The gold standard. Features a massive searchable database and an active community forum for tracking wins.

name: The Freebie Guy
description: The fastest updates on the web. If a brand drops a new giveaway, you'll find it here first.

name: Contest Girl
description: Loved for its clean, ad-free organization. Best for users who like to stay organized with daily entries.

name: Infinite Sweeps
description: An endless list of sweepstakes categorized by prize type. Great for finding specific items like 'Cash' or 'Cars'.

name: FreebieShark
